records.question: Which papers has Aaron Turon authored where he appears in position 2 or higher in the author list?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron' AND authors.lname = 'Turon' AND authorship.authorder >= 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authors.fname = 'Aaron' AND Authors.lname = 'Turon' AND Authorship.authOrder >= 2

records.question: What papers have Atsushi Ohori as an author where he appears in authorship order at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Atsushi' AND authorship.authorder <= 1 AND authors.lname = 'Ohori'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authors.fname = 'Atsushi' AND Authors.lname = 'Ohori' AND Authorship.authOrder <= 1

records.question: Which papers were authored by someone whose first name is Aaron?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.fname = 'Aaron'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authors.fname = 'Aaron'

records.question: Which papers have at least 1 author affiliated with the University of Oxford?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN inst ON authorship.instid = inst.instid
WHERE inst.name = 'University of Oxford' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Inst ON Authorship.instID = Inst.instID
WHERE Inst.name = 'University of Oxford'
GROUP BY Papers.paperID

records.question: Which papers have Ralf Hinze as an author in position 1 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
JOIN authors ON authorship.authid = authors.authid
WHERE authors.lname = 'Hinze' AND authors.fname = 'Ralf' AND authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
JOIN Authors ON Authorship.authID = Authors.authID
WHERE Authors.fname = 'Ralf' AND Authors.lname = 'Hinze' AND Authorship.authOrder >= 1

records.question: Which papers have authors listed with an author order of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Authorship
  WHERE Authorship.paperID = Papers.paperID
    AND Authorship.authOrder >= 1
)

records.question: Which papers have an author listed exactly as number 3 in the author order?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder = 3

records.question: Which papers have a first author listed exactly as author number 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Papers.paperID
FROM Papers
JOIN Authorship ON Papers.paperID = Authorship.paperID
WHERE Authorship.authOrder = 1
